get.description: Returns paginated list of orders filtered by status (admin only)

Approves or rejects an organiser account (admin only)

post.description: Sends a reset link if the account exists (prevents email enumeration)
Authenticates user and returns access token; sets session cookies
Invalidates refresh token and clears both session cookies

Rotates the refresh token and issues a new access token.
Note: if two tabs refresh simultaneously, one will fail with INVALID_TOKEN
and the client will be logged out. This is acceptable behaviour for
a single-device session model.
Creates a new attendee or organiser account
Resets password using a reset token
Validates QR code and marks ticket as checked in (organiser only)

Returns a list of all event categories
Returns all published events
Returns a single event by its slug

Returns a single event by its ID

Returns a specific ticket type
